asset_tasks.prompt: a white lighthouse on a rocky cape at dawn, muted maritime palette, archival film grade, cinematic, soft fog

shots.prompt_intent: slow push toward the lighthouse at dawn, gentle swell
shots.narration: In 1716 the first American lighthouse rose.

shots.prompt_intent: the rotating Fresnel lens glows amber inside the lamp room
shots.narration: Its lens threw a beam for twenty miles.

shots.prompt_intent: the beam sweeps across a calm sea at dusk in light fog
shots.narration: Today they stand automated and quiet.
